title: Text → Text
subtitle: AI that generates text from text prompts
question: Does anyone know the technical term for these kinds of models?

chatDemos.label: Math
chatDemos.userMessage: Remind me what the quadratic formula is
chatDemos.responseText:
The quadratic formula is:

$$x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$$

It gives you the solutions to any equation in the form $ax^2 + bx + c = 0$.

chatDemos.label: Coding
chatDemos.userMessage: How do I write a Python script that makes the computer say 'hello world'?
chatDemos.responseText:
Here you go! Just use the print function:

```python
print("Hello, World!")
```

Save this as a .py file and run it with Python.
